message:
audit: batch 386 continued — browser-core close/cancel state-loss fix SOUND

Diff audit of asupersync-browser-core: websocket close/cancel now
preserves state on failure via &mut borrow + re-insert pattern.
Close reason validated against 123-byte RFC limit. Tests verify
state preservation after oversized reason rejection.
